value.rationale: The page describes a Fine-Grained Permissions Engine with allow/deny/ask lists and actions including `unsandboxed`, but there is no mention of a "proceed-in-sandbox" permission preset that auto-proceeds tool actions when run inside the sandbox. The page references sandboxing in the context of the `unsandboxed` action (which runs commands outside container isolation) and a Sandbox Customization link, but nothing describes an auto-proceed/auto-approve preset tied to running inside the sandbox. The claimed offering is not present on the page.
